description: Arbiter-archetype mid-battle taunts. Voice: judicial, privilege-aware, authoritative. Each line is a ruling or an objection. Speaker is resolved from the active boss at display time (Arbiter of Steel, Arbiter of the Benchmark, Arbiter of the Root Process, etc.).

taunts.text: You are running in unprivileged mode. That is not my fault. That is the design of the system. I am merely enforcing it.
I am hearing evidence. The evidence is: you hit less hard than the case predicted. I will lower the bar. Lowering the bar will not change the verdict.
The ruling is being drafted. You will not enjoy the ruling. It is, however, technically correct, which is the ruling I am authorized to issue.
Ruling: insufficient. Costs: awarded against you in full. Appeal: denied. Appeal of the appeal: also denied. Thank you for your time in the matter.
